name: Rosa DeLauro
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $573,343 for Rosa DeLauro in U.S. House, CT-03. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
